item.title: Homemade Animal Style Fries Recipe
item.description: These Animal Style Fries are crispy, cheesy, and topped with sweet caramelized onions and tangy burger sauce. This recipe is simple to make at home with frozen or homemade fries. Serve them up alongside my smash burger recipe for the best fast-food-style dinner at home.

media:content.media:title: Homemade Animal Style Fries Recipe
media:content.media:description: These Animal Style Fries are crispy, cheesy, and topped with sweet caramelized onions and tangy burger sauce. This recipe is simple to make at home with frozen or homemade fries. Serve them up alongside my smash burger recipe for the best fast-food-style dinner at home.

item.title: Delicious Tropical Banana Bread
item.description: This Tropical Banana Bread is the softest, most buttery, moist banana bread you’ll ever have. It’s got pineapple, coconut, and toasted macadamia nuts for a sunny twist on a classic loaf. Some riffs on banana bread that I also love are my tahini banana bread and butter pecan banana bread, which you should definitely give a try.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Tropical Banana Bread
media:content.media:description: This Tropical Banana Bread is the softest, most buttery, moist banana bread you’ll ever have. It’s got pineapple, coconut, and toasted macadamia nuts for a sunny twist on a classic loaf. Some riffs on banana bread that I also love are my tahini banana bread and butter pecan banana bread, which you should definitely give a try.

item.title: Fluffy and Delicious: Lemon Blueberry Cottage Cheese Pancakes
item.description:
Recipe: 2 tbls melted butter 1/2 cup cottage cheese 3 tbls sugar 1 tsps pure vanilla extract Zest from 1 lemon 1 large egg 1 cup all-purpose flour 1 tbls baking powder 1/4 tsp kosher salt 1 cup blueberries
To a food processor (or small blender), add the butter, cottage cheese, sugar, vanilla, lemon zest and egg. Pulse until smooth. In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder and salt. Pour in the wet ingredients and mix until combined. Butter a non-stick skillet and pour in 1/4 cup of batter. Add the blueberries to the pancakes and then cook for 1 minute. Flip on opposite side for an additional minute. Repeat.

media:content.media:title: Fluffy and Delicious: Lemon Blueberry Cottage Cheese Pancakes
media:content.media:description:
Recipe: 2 tbls melted butter 1/2 cup cottage cheese 3 tbls sugar 1 tsps pure vanilla extract Zest from 1 lemon 1 large egg 1 cup all-purpose flour 1 tbls baking powder 1/4 tsp kosher salt 1 cup blueberries
To a food processor (or small blender), add the butter, cottage cheese, sugar, vanilla, lemon zest and egg. Pulse until smooth. In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder and salt. Pour in the wet ingredients and mix until combined. Butter a non-stick skillet and pour in 1/4 cup of batter. Add the blueberries to the pancakes and then cook for 1 minute. Flip on opposite side for an additional minute. Repeat.

item.title: Lemon Chicken Rice Soup Recipe
item.description: Lemon and chicken rice soup recipe with a light, comforting flavor.

media:content.media:title: Lemon Chicken Rice Soup Recipe
media:content.media:description: Lemon and chicken rice soup recipe with a light, comforting flavor.

item.title: Delicious Sardine Green Olive Pasta
item.description: Simple sardine and green olive pasta recipe for dinner.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Sardine Green Olive Pasta
media:content.media:description: Simple sardine and green olive pasta recipe for dinner.

item.title: Quick and Delicious Miso Honey Lemon Salmon Recipe
item.description: This Miso Lemon Salmon is quick, easy, and comes together in under 20 minutes. It’s the perfect weeknight meal that doubles as meal prep for the week. It’s bright, it’s both sweet and savory, and tastes so good with rice or on top of my endive salad.

media:content.media:title: Quick and Delicious Miso Honey Lemon Salmon Recipe
media:content.media:description: This Miso Lemon Salmon is quick, easy, and comes together in under 20 minutes. It’s the perfect weeknight meal that doubles as meal prep for the week. It’s bright, it’s both sweet and savory, and tastes so good with rice or on top of my endive salad.

item.title: Mini Strawberry Cake Recipe
item.description: Is there anything cuter than pink cake? I think not. This Mini Strawberry Cake is the perfect small batch cake. It has a deliciously fluffy texture and tastes EXACTLY like a fresh, sweet strawberry.

media:content.media:title: Mini Strawberry Cake Recipe
media:content.media:description: Is there anything cuter than pink cake? I think not. This Mini Strawberry Cake is the perfect small batch cake. It has a deliciously fluffy texture and tastes EXACTLY like a fresh, sweet strawberry.

item.title: The Best Caesar Salad recipe
item.description: The Best Caesar Salad recipe consists of a thick dressing made up of egg yolks, anchovy fillets, olive oil, parmesan and lemon juice. These ingredients create a delicious savory dressing that is delicious when tossed with garlic croutons and crisp romaine leaves.

media:content.media:title: The Best Caesar Salad recipe
media:content.media:description: The Best Caesar Salad recipe consists of a thick dressing made up of egg yolks, anchovy fillets, olive oil, parmesan and lemon juice. These ingredients create a delicious savory dressing that is delicious when tossed with garlic croutons and crisp romaine leaves.
